signals.reasoning: BTC is already in a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL has already moved into flush territory, so I would rather wait for a bounce than force a new short here.
CHILLGUY is already weak and too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh short entry after the move.
ZEREBRO is too low-liquidity and too unstable to trust for a fresh directional trade.
COMP remains the only meaningful long candidate because funding is still deeply negative while price is holding up, though poor liquidity keeps confidence capped.
BABY is too low-liquidity and too mixed structurally to justify a fresh directional trade.
BIO has squeeze fuel from negative funding, but liquidity is too poor and the active veto blocks forcing a fresh long.
LIT is already down hard and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
ETHFI has some squeeze potential from negative funding, but it is still too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh trade.
GRIFFAIN is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
